headline: PRIYANKA CHOPRA JONAS NAMED IN BBC'S LIST OF 100 MOST INFLUENTIAL WOMEN IN THE WORLD FOR HER IMPACTING CAREER
summary: Priyanka Chopra Jonas has been included in BBC's list of 100 most influential women in the world. She has acted in over 60 Hindi films and played the lead role in the ABC series Quantico. The actor has also started her journey as a producer and entrepreneur. Additionally, Priyanka has written a memoir called Unfinished, which covers various chapters from her life. She is considered an inspiration for many, including US-born R&B singer-songwriter Amrit Dasu, who hopes to collaborate with her.
